project.description:
Semantic Colors — a generic, extensible scheme for colours keyed by semantic meaning (success, danger, happy, worried, relaxed). Each meaning owns a degree SCALE modelled as a function, not a stored list:
resolve : (SemanticColor, Degree) -> PhysicalColor
The (SemanticColor, Degree) pair is the portable, realization-free part; the resolver body (interpolation / colour math) is deferred and theme-swappable. Degree is a proper rational in [0, 1). Generic by construction: a SemanticColor is a pure identity that never references a domain. A clean leaf module — no framework dependencies.
